texto: The sound of the gunshot in that narrow tunnel was like being inside a thunderbolt. I held my eyes closed, my fingers still clinging to the barrel."Ow!" the Mad Hatter shouted a distance ahead. "That thing is loud!"I opened my eyes. Nine of Spades lay in front of me. He didn't move."Heh. You've got quite a roar, little lion. I've never seen a lion's roar do that, but I've never seen an elephant fit in a tin can either.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a DAVID D HAMMONS: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The sound of the gunshot in that narrow tunnel was like being inside a thunderbolt. I held my eye…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, fantasy, retellings pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e retellings.

frase_original: The sound of the gunshot in that narrow tunnel was like being inside a thunderbolt. I held my eyes closed, my fingers still clinging to the barrel."Ow!" the Mad Hatter shouted a distance ahead. "That thing is loud!"I opened my eyes. Nine of Spades lay in front of me. He didn't move."Heh. You've got quite a roar, little lion. I've never seen a lion's roar do that, but I've never seen an elephant fit in a tin can either.
